No more ETH dumps? Ethereum Foundation turns to DeFi for cash
articles.description: The Ethereum Foundation (EF) has borrowed $2 million in GHO, a decentralized stablecoin developed by Aave, in a move signaling deeper engagement with decentralized finance (DeFi) strategies. U.S. labor department withdraws crypto caution, opening door for Bitcoin in 401(k) plans
articles.description: 29-5-2025 – The United States Department of Labor has rescinded its earlier caution against incorporating cryptocurrencies into retirement plans, a move that has sparked both enthusiasm and measured concern among financial circles.
